Usage:
  circleci namespace <command> [flags]
  circleci namespace [command]

Available Commands:
  create      Create a namespace
  delete      Delete a namespace and all its orbs
  get         Get details of a namespace
  rename      Rename a namespace

Global Flags:
  -c, --config string   path to config file (default: ~/.config/circleci/config.yml)
      --debug           enable debug logging
  -q, --quiet           suppress informational output; data on stdout is unaffected

Use "circleci namespace [command] --help" for more information about a command.
